title: Table-valued functions do not work as the right table of a LEFT JOIN
poc: SELECT x, value FROM t1 LEFT JOIN json_each('["b"]') ON x=value;
SELECT x, value FROM t1 LEFT JOIN json_each ON x=value WHERE json='["b"]';
SELECT x, value FROM t1 LEFT JOIN json_each ON x=value AND json='["b"]';
key_bug_features: Table-valued functions as right table in LEFT JOIN
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE t1(x TEXT, y INTEGER);
SELECT x, value FROM t1 LEFT JOIN json_each('[''b'']') ON x=value;
